channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump and Allies Discuss Plan to Remove Impeachments from Record
item.description: President Donald Trump and congressional allies are considering a push to formally expunge his two impeachments from the House record.

item.title: DOJ Emails Reveal Internal Turmoil Over Biden-Era School Board Memo
item.description: Internal DOJ emails show officials criticized Garland's 2021 school board memo, warning it could appear as an "Anti-MAGA Task Force."

item.title: Court Denies Kennedy Center Bid to Halt Trump Name Removal
item.description: A judge denied the Kennedy Center's request to pause a ruling ordering President Donald Trump's name removed from the building.

item.title: RNC Chair Says GOP in Strong Position Ahead of Midterms
item.description: RNC Chair Joe Gruters expressed confidence in GOP prospects for the 2026 midterms, citing President Donald Trump's policies.
